breaks.scene_hint: A quieter, reflective moment as the protagonist adjusts to his new surroundings — dialogue-light and atmospherically slow
A transitional lull between two dramatic confrontations — mostly ambient background tension with no major revelations
A secondary character scene with expository conversation — sets mood but doesn't drive the central mystery forward

conservative_breaks.scene_hint: The first act wraps up with a calm, introspective sequence — the pace slows and no critical plot turns are imminent
A mid-film breather between tension peaks — characters regroup in a low-key, dialogue-driven setting

relaxed_breaks.scene_hint: Late first act — a mood-setting montage or environmental scene establishing the outside world's feel
Post-act-one transition — a quiet emotional beat with minimal narrative consequence
Mid-film scene transition — a calm interlude between two waves of psychological tension
A supporting character interaction that provides background context — important but not a plot pivot
